task_domain: Self-improvement of the EVOLVE_AUTORESEARCH meta-skill for prompt optimization workflows inspired by karpathy/autoresearch.

criteria.text: Clearly distinguishes ordinary target-prompt optimization from self-improvement of this meta-skill or the /evolve command.
Requires baseline-first evaluation and a frozen harness before any candidate scoring.
Defines explicit crash handling with limited retry judgement and crash logging semantics.
Enforces the same fixed test pool and sample budget for baseline and every candidate.
Requires concrete disk artifacts for the run: harness snapshot, fixed test cases, experiments TSV, and evolve-response XML.
If a self-improvement run also updates /evolve, says that command sync happens only after one target artifact wins the run.

scoring_formula: total_score = sum over 3 samples of 6 binary criteria passes
